data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of credit rollover for unused time, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the rollover of unused hours, yet there is no concrete evidence or API endpoints that demonstrate this capability. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support the validation of the 'credit rollover for unused time' feature.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of credit rollover for unused time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to validate credit rollover functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows for credit rollover of unused time.
